pyreportengine
  • Welcome to pyreportengine
  • View page source

Welcome to pyreportengine

pyreportengine is a Python reporting framework for generating technical engineering reports (CFD, FEM, modal analysis, etc.). It is a “programmable PowerPoint” with fully decoupled render backends (PDF, PPTX, HTML).
